source_pr.title: expression: implement vectorized evaluation for `builtinUnixTimestampDecSig`
source_pr.body:
PCP #12102

What problem does this PR solve?

Implement vectorized evaluation for builtinUnixTimestampDecSig from[#12102 ]

What is changed and how it works?

Here is the benchmark,About 22% faster than before:

```
BenchmarkVectorizedBuiltinTimeFunc/builtinUnixTimestampDecSig-VecBuiltinFunc-8                              6283                    217223 ns/op      
BenchmarkVectorizedBuiltinTimeFunc/builtinUnixTimestampDecSig-NonVecBuiltinFunc-8                           4338                    278015 ns/op    
```
Check List

Tests

    Unit test

symptoms: + // We remove this case to stabilize CI, and will reopen this when we fix the issue above.
